Global employment runs on Remote
Hire and pay anyone in the world — with the compliance, reliability, and local expertise that only owned infrastructure delivers.
Book demo
Sign up
GLOBAL COMPANIES GROW WITH REMOTE
How we do it
One system of record. Every employment need.
Employer of Record (EOR)
Need to hire
a
nyone, anywhere? We handle the employment contract, taxes, benefits, and compliance — onboarded in hours, not months.
Learn More
Global Payroll
Accurate, compliant payroll in every country you operate. Run by our in-house teams, no partner network.
Learn More
Contractor of Record (COR)
Engage international contractors compliantly. Contracts, payments, and risk — all handled by our experts.
Learn More
Contractor Management
Engage contractors compliantly, anywhere — and convert them to FTEs before misclassification risk becomes a legal problem.
Learn More
Professional Employer Organization (PEO)
US hiring without the admin burden. Payroll, taxes, benefits, all taken care of.
Learn More
How we do it
One system of record. Every employment need.
Your browser does not support the video tag.
Global payment is hard. We built the infrastructure to do it right.
Every country has different laws, tax codes, payroll rules, and compliance requirements. Remote handles the hard stuff — with in-house payroll teams, local legal experts, and owned entities in every market we operate in.
Intelligent infrastructure
Owned end-to-end infrastructure, operated in-house.
We have our own legal experts, our own payroll specialists, and our own compliance teams in every market we operate in. And because it's all ours, everything lives in one place: every employment record, contract, compliance document, and payroll engine run accurate, current, audit-ready,
SOC 2 Type 2
compliant, and
ISO 27001 certified
.
Hiring internationally, converting contractors, or consolidating payroll? Talk to our team.
Book demo
Your workflows, your way, on our infrastructure
MCP
Deploy AI agents on real employment data
Remote MCP gives any AI agent a live, secure connection to payroll, contracts, compliance data, and org structure — no API keys, no exports, no custom integrations needed.
Learn more
Integrations
Plug Remote into your stack
Keep the HR tools your team already uses. Remote runs the payroll and compliance underneath, natively integrated with Workday, HiBob, BambooHR, Personio, and more.
See all integrations
API
Build on top of ours
Remote is API-first by design. Use our REST API, webhooks, and CLI to build custom workflows, embed global employment into your own product, or extend Remote however your business needs.
Explore the API
The global payroll backbone
The world’s best teams run on Remote
Remote is the infrastructure leading HR platforms trust to deliver global payroll, EOR, and contractor management to their customers.
Become a Partner
A word from our
customers
Join customers who trust Remote to transform their business.
"If we had to manage and coordinate everything in-house, it would cost us well over $500,000 more each year. Remote not only eliminates that financial strain but also takes the operational burden off our plate, allowing us to focus on growing our business with confidence and efficiency."
Luke McKinlay
VP of Finance
Read full customer story
Read full customer story
"We run monthly, semi-monthly and hourly payroll in multiple different currencies around the world and our Finance Manager has full visibility in a single platform. With Remote, you can make it happen."
Marisol Jiménez
Head of People
Read full customer story
Read full customer story
“We work with 460+ Contractors globally. I’d need to employ 5 or 6 people full time to keep on top of compliance, administration and payroll. Remote has definitely been a time and money saver for us.”
Erik Sveen
Founder and CEO
Read full customer story
Read full customer story
"We see Remote as a leading and trusted partner in this space. The expert support they provide in local payroll, tax compliance, and HR operations has streamlined our processes and created more opportunities for growth and success on a global scale."
Maria Shkaruppa
Senior Global Mobility and Remote Hiring Manager

From

PEO is billed in USD and requires a U.S. bank account
Simplify equity grants, reduce legal costs
Remote offers Equity pricing for companies that need to grant equity to employees and contractors across global teams.
"Remote Equity has taken the entire process of equity off our hands. All we need to do is decide who’s granted what, then grant it. No need to worry about what happens in between."
Mehdi Boudoukhane
Founder & CEO

per month

for all direct employees

Employee profile and document management

Employee and manager self-serve experiencea
Mobile app
Supporting impact with tailored pricing
Whether you're a startup or social purpose organization, we have exclusive offers to help you grow your impact worldwide.
Startup
Start your journey today with an exclusive offer on our core services, designed to give your startup the competitive edge it needs to succeed.
Get 15% off
Social Purpose
We have dedicated offers specifically for social-purpose organizations. Remote is proud to help your mission grow by making global employment accessible to everyone.
Get 15% off
Frequently Asked Questions
Do you require deposits or accruals?
We collect reserve payments in rare, high risk circumstances. This is a form of financial security that enables us to pay employees even if the customer is unable to pay us. Other EOR providers charge additional deposits for offering PTO above the legal minimum, removing probation periods, incentive plans and monthly severance accruals. We don’t.
How do you h

analysis.name: Remote
analysis.tagline: Manage, pay, and recruit global talent in a unified platform
analysis.value_proposition: Global employment infrastructure enabling companies to hire, pay, and manage international employees and contractors compliantly across 180+ countries without establishing local entities.
analysis.ideal_customer: Companies scaling internationally who need compliant employment, payroll, and contractor management across multiple countries without local entity overhead — from seed-stage startups to large enterprises.

features.name: employer of record
features.description: Hire full-time employees in foreign countries through Remote as the legal employer, handling all compliance, tax, and payroll
features.evidence_quote: Expand globally with zero entity cost

features.name: global payroll
features.description: Run compliant multi-country payroll for employees across different jurisdictions from one platform

features.name: contractor of record
features.description: Engage contractors worldwide compliantly through Remote as the contracting intermediary

features.name: contractor management
features.description: Onboard, manage, and pay contractors globally from a single dashboard

features.name: peo
features.description: Professional Employer Organization service to co-employ workers and outsource complex employment administration

features.name: remote embedded
features.description: White-label global HR infrastructure that third-party HR and fintech platforms can embed natively into their products

features.name: core hr platform
features.description: Built-in HRIS functions including employee records, org management, time-off, and document storage
features.evidence_quote: Built-in core HR functions for your team

features.name: remote mcp
features.description: Model Context Protocol integration enabling AI tools to query and interact with Remote HR and payroll data programmatically
features.evidence_quote: Connect any AI tool to Remote using our MCP

features.name: background checks
features.description: Integrated candidate screening and background check service for global hires

features.name: compliance watchtower
features.description: Proactive monitoring service that alerts companies to global employment compliance risks before they become violations

features.name: device management
features.description: Provision, track, and manage IT devices for globally distributed employees
features.evidence_quote: Provision and track IT devices globally

features.name: entity setup
features.description: Assisted service to establish legally compliant business entities in foreign countries

features.name: mobility and relocation
features.description: Managed employee international relocation, visa support, and mobility services

features.name: benefits management
features.description: Administer and manage employee benefits packages across multiple countries

features.name: country explorer
features.description: Country-by-country self-serve reference guide covering employment laws, costs, and compliance requirements
features.evidence_quote: Find global employment support by country

features.name: us state explorer
features.description: State-by-state US employment law and compliance guide for domestic multi-state hiring
features.evidence_quote: Simplify hiring across all US states

features.name: misclassification risk calculator
features.description: Self-serve tool to assess contractor vs. employee misclassification risk by country
features.evidence_quote: Check employee misclassification risk by country

features.name: employee cost calculator
features.description: Calculate total employer cost (salary + benefits + taxes) for hiring in any country
features.evidence_quote: Calculate total employee costs in any country

features.name: contractor payout calculator
features.description: Explore currency options and payout speeds when paying international contractors
features.evidence_quote: Explore currency options and payout speeds for global contractors

features.name: ask an expert
features.description: On-demand human expert consultation service for global HR and employment compliance questions
features.evidence_quote: Get expert help on global HR & compliance

features.name: remote api
features.description: Public REST API for programmatic access to Remote platform data and operations

features.name: zapier integration
features.description: Zapier connector for no-code workflow automation between Remote and 5000+ apps

features.name: workday integration
features.description: Bidirectional sync of employee records between Workday HRIS and Remote

features.name: bamboohr integration
features.description: Sync employee data between BambooHR and Remote for unified HR records

features.name: greenhouse integration
features.description: Connect Greenhouse ATS with Remote for seamless handoff from hiring to onboarding

features.name: slack integration
features.description: Slack notifications and workflow triggers tied to Remote platform events

features.name: quickbooks integration
features.description: Sync payroll and payment data between QuickBooks and Remote for accounting

features.name: netsuite integration
features.description: Sync HR and financial data between NetSuite ERP and Remote

features.name: xero integration
features.description: Sync payroll and financial data between Xero accounting and Remote

features.name: hibob integration
features.description: Sync employee lifecycle data between HiBob HRIS and Remote

features.name: personio integration
features.description: Sync employee data between Personio HR platform and Remote

features.name: gusto integration
features.description: Connect Gusto US payroll with Remote for companies running domestic and international payroll

features.name: vanta integration
features.description: Sync Remote employee data into Vanta for automated security compliance evidence

features.name: sequoia integration
features.description: Connect Sequoia People Platform with Remote for benefits and compensation data

features.name: goco integration
features.description: Sync HR data between GoCo and Remote

features.name: easop integration
features.description: Connect Easop equity management with Remote for global equity compensation workflows

features.name: zelt integration
features.description: Sync people ops data between Zelt and Remote

features.name: mosey partnership
features.description: Integration with Mosey for US state compliance and entity formation

features.name: gifted integration
features.description: Connect Gifted employee gifting platform with Remote employee data

features.name: blackbird remote connector
features.description: Blackbird connector for Remote platform data synchronization

features.name: strategic technology partnerships
features.description: Partnership program allowing platforms to embed Remote's global HR capabilities under their own brand
features.evidence_quote: Flexibly embed global HR into your platform

features.name: remote build
features.description: Integrations and AI automations consulting service (coming soon)
features.evidence_quote: Coming soon — Integrations and AI Automations Consulting

features.name: salary and talent insights
features.description: Compensation benchmarking and global talent market data resource

features.name: hr glossary
features.description: Self-serve reference library of global HR and employment terminology

features.name: job description library
features.description: Library of pre-built compliant job description templates

differentiators: Expand globally with zero entity cost — EOR model eliminates need to establish foreign legal entities
Unified platform covering employment, payroll, and contractor management globally
Remote Embedded — white-label HR infrastructure for third-party platforms to embed natively
Remote Connect (MCP) — first EOR platform with Model Context Protocol for AI tool integration
Compliance Watchtower — proactive compliance risk monitoring, not just reactive support
Remote Build — AI automations consulting for HR integrations (positioning into services layer)

recent_ships.what: Remote Connect (MCP) — AI tool integration via Model Context Protocol, enabling any AI to query Remote data
recent_ships.source: Connect any AI tool to Remote using our MCP (marked 'New' in navigation)

pricing.notes: Pricing page did not render tier data in scraped source — only navigation and cookie consent loaded. No tier names or prices were extractable from the provided source text. Remote historically publishes flat per-employee and per-contractor monthly rates, but no figures are confirmable from these sources.
